code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_Firewall] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {Security_Firewall] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {Security_ZeroTrust] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {Security_ZeroTrust] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {Security_Encryption] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {Security_ZeroTrust] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {Security_ZeroTrust] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {Security_OAuth2] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {Security_OAuth2] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {Security_ZeroTrust] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {Security_ZeroTrust] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {Security_ZeroTrust] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个自适应的实时图像处理系统状态机，核心是能够根据设备性能和当前运行状况动态调整工作模式。先从初始流程开始吧，系统启动后应该有一个安全防火墙检查点。
明白了，Security_Firewall作为入口，然后进入AppInitialization。接下来是启动性能监控吗？
对，AppInitialization通过'Start Performance Monitor'触发PerformanceAssessment，然后依次进行DeviceCapabilityCheck和InitialModeSelection。这里的关键是根据设备档次分流到四种模式。
好的，我先把主线画出来：Low-end Device进UltraFastMode，Mid-range Device进FastMode，High-end Device进BalancedMode，Premium Device进HighQualityMode。四种模式都作为复合状态来设计内部流程。
UltraFastMode针对低端设备，内部结构要极简：从Security_Firewall进入QuarterResolution，然后是BasicFaceDetection、MinimalProcessing、LowBatteryUsage，最后到PerformanceMonitoring。注意这个模式用Security_Firewall作为内部入口。
UltraFastMode内部完成了。FastMode我用Security_ZeroTrust作为入口，走HalfResolution - FaceDetection - BasicNSFWDetection - ModerateBatteryUsage - PerformanceMonitoring。
BalancedMode是推荐模式，功能要完整。Security_ZeroTrust入口，FullResolution之后依次CompleteFaceDetection、FullNSFWDetection、GenderClassification、OptimalBatteryUsage。

BalancedMode内部画好了。HighQualityMode用Security_Encryption入口，走EnhancedResolution - AdvancedFaceDetection - EnhancedNSFWDetection - DetailedGenderClassification - ContentDensityAnalysis - HighBatteryUsage。这个模式多了内容密度分析。
所有模式最终都汇聚到PerformanceMonitoring，然后进入ContinuousMonitoring作为核心监控循环。这个复合状态需要监控CPU、内存、电池、温度和网络延迟。
ContinuousMonitoring内部结构：Security_ZeroTrust入口，CPUUsageCheck - MemoryUsageCheck - BatteryLevelCheck - ThermalStateCheck - NetworkLatencyCheck - PerformanceDecision。
PerformanceDecision是关键的决策点，分出三条路径：Performance Good保持现状，Performance Issues需要DegradePerformance，Resources Available则ImprovePerformance。
DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance都是复合状态吧？需要设计内部的具体降级和优化步骤。

DegradePerformance用Security_ZeroTrust入口，流程是ReduceDetectionFrequency - LowerResolution - DisableNonEssentialFeatures - IncreaseCacheUsage - OptimizeMemoryUsage。ImprovePerformance用Security_IntrusionDetection入口，走IncreaseDetectionQuality - HigherResolution - EnableAdditionalFeatures - ReduceCacheDependency - EnhancePrecision。
两个性能调整状态都画好了。它们和MaintainCurrentMode都流向AdaptiveAdjustment？
没错，三条路径都汇聚到AdaptiveAdjustment。这个状态负责应用变更：Security_OAuth2入口，ApplyChanges - TestNewSettings - ValidatePerformance - UpdateConfiguration，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring继续监控。
我想到还需要处理紧急情况。ContinuousMonitoring应该能检测到Critical Performance Issue，进入EmergencyMode。
对，EmergencyMode用Security_OAuth2入口，内部走MinimalDetection - CriticalFeaturesOnly - MaximumCaching - EmergencyOptimization - GradualRecovery，恢复后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
EmergencyMode加好了。还需要用户主动干预的入口吗？
需要，ContinuousMonitoring检测到User Changes Settings时进入UserModeChange。Security_ZeroTrust入口，ValidateUserChoice - ApplyUserSettings - WarnIfIncompatible - AcceptOverride，最后返回监控循环。
电池优化和温度管理也需要独立的状态吧？

是的。Low Battery Detected触发BatteryOptimization，Security_ZeroTrust入口，ReduceProcessingFrequency - DisableBackgroundFeatures - MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks - EnableDeepCaching - BatterySaveMode。Overheating Detected触发ThermalThrottling，Security_ZeroTrust入口，ReduceProcessorUsage - IncreaseProcessingIntervals - DisableGPUAcceleration - CooldownPause - ThermalRecovery。
电池优化和温控状态都完成了，它们都在条件满足后返回ContinuousMonitoring。现在需要给主要模式添加说明注释吗？
给UltraFastMode、BalancedMode和HighQualityMode加注释。UltraFastMode标注基础保护、224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、约2%每小时耗电。BalancedMode标注推荐模式、完整功能、原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%每小时耗电。HighQualityMode标注最大精度、增强处理、内容密度分析、3000ms间隔、12-15%每小时耗电。
三条注释都加在对应状态的右侧。我检查一下整体结构：安全入口有Firewall、ZeroTrust、Encryption、IntrusionDetection、OAuth2五种，分别用于不同安全等级的状态。
对，安全层级设计是：Firewall用于最基础的UltraFastMode，ZeroTrust用于大多数标准操作，Encryption用于高质量处理，IntrusionDetection用于性能提升，OAuth2用于系统级调整如自适应和紧急模式。
我发现一个问题：UltraFastMode内部入口写的是Security_Firewall，但其他模式比如FastMode、BalancedMode等内部入口是Security_ZeroTrust，这种混合写法在Mermaid里可能需要确认。另外ContinuousMonitoring到各个触发状态的标签需要明确。

Security_Firewall只在UltraFastMode内部使用是正确的，因为低端设备只做最基础防护。ContinuousMonitoring的出边标签确认一下：Critical Performance Issue到EmergencyMode，User Changes Settings到UserModeChange，Low Battery Detected到BatteryOptimization，Overheating Detected到ThermalThrottling。返回边分别是Performance Recovered、Settings Applied、Battery Level Improved、Temperature Normal。
所有标签都修正好了。AdaptiveAdjustment返回ContinuousMonitoring的标签是'Return to Monitoring'，这个也确认了。
再确认一下DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance的内部终点，它们都直接连到AdaptiveAdjustment，不需要额外的汇聚状态。
确认无误。整个状态机结构完整了：从Security_Firewall启动，经性能评估分流到四种工作模式，持续监控后根据状况自适应调整，同时处理紧急、用户干预、电池和温度四种特殊场景。
最后检查一下复合状态的闭合性，每个state定义都要有对应的大括号闭合，注释位置要准确对应到目标状态。
所有复合状态都已正确闭合，12个复合状态完整定义，注释位置准确。状态机可以渲染了。
